$comment: Least-privilege contract for the app-only Microsoft Graph app registration (TASK-621). scripts/audit-graph-app-permissions.mjs decodes the app token's roles claim and fails on drift. Owner: Vince. Enforcement: preflight-invocable audit script + runbook docs/runbooks/graph-least-privilege.md.

siteGrants.$comment: Granted per-site via POST /sites/{siteId}/permissions once Sites.Selected replaces the broad role.

transitionalRoles.$comment: Broad legacy role the sync engine runs on today. Retire after Sites.Selected + the site grant above are verified in production.
